Package reciprocal.linear.field

Interface QuotientField<E extends Number,Q extends Number,A extends Number>

Type Parameters:
E - type of elements
Q - type of quotient
A - type of absolut value
All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigComplexQuotientField, BigDecimalQuotientField, BigGaussianQuotientField, BigIntegerQuotientField, ComplexQuotientField, DoubleQuotientField, GaussianQuotientField, LongQuotientField
@API(status=EXPERIMENTAL, since="0.0.1") public interface QuotientField<E extends Number,Q extends Number,A extends Number> extends Serializable
Interface for quotient fields
